strategy: Sell weekly OTM cash-secured puts on AI/tech/growth stocks (31-ticker watchlist). Target premium/strike >= 0.8-1%/week. Entry signal: RSI < per-tier threshold AND MFI < 25.
portfolios: IRA (conservative, lower-beta), FILDI (core strategy, full watchlist), MOM (momentum/aggressive, higher beta allowed)
macroFocus: Fed rate expectations — watch CME FedWatch for cut/hike probability shifts
CPI/PCE prints — above-expectation = rate pressure on growth multiples
10Y Treasury yield — above 4.5% historically pressures high-PE tech
VIX interpretation: <15 = low fear (IV crushed, less premium), 15-25 = normal, >25 = elevated fear (good premium but risky), >30 = consider sizing down
Dollar strength (UUP) — strong dollar = headwind for BABA and export-heavy names
AI sector rotation — watch NVDA, SMCI, PLTR as bellwethers
watchSignals: NVDA: new product cycles, blackwell/rubin ramp, China export restrictions
OPEN: Russell index inclusion/exclusion, housing market trends
HOOD: regulatory changes, new product launches (options, crypto, international expansion)
PLTR: government contract wins, AI platform adoption
TSLA: deliveries vs estimates, autonomous driving news, Elon distraction premium
riskRules: Avoid opening new puts < 2 weeks before known earnings
Prioritize T1 tickers (NVDA, AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, TSLA, NOW) for IRA
T2/T3 tickers (OPEN, ONDS, POET, RDW) for FILDI/MOM only
